message:
Fix HTTP/2 flow control validation and refactor stream data dequeue

- connection.rs: Validate DATA frame payload against connection flow control
  window BEFORE updating stream state, preventing window underflow when
  oversized frames arrive; add test for exceeding connection window
- stream.rs: Refactor take_pending_data to avoid double mutable borrow by
  checking immutable borrow first for full-chunk case, improving clarity
  and eliminating unnecessary mutable access

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
